title: Faithful Mace - Loot Table Add-On
description: An Add-On for the mod “Faithful Mace” that adds loot tables. Where the items can be obtained in structures.
body:
# Faithful Mace – Loot Table Add-On

![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7246c625483d6242a8c3a073fc0586e930ccd85d.png)

## About
This Add-On adds loot to structures like the Ancient City to properly reward players with the items used in the **Faithful Mace** mod.  
This makes it so that these items can be found naturally without the presence of a Trial Chamber in Minecraft 1.20.1.

This mod **requires the original Faithful Mace mod** to recognize the items:  
https://modrinth.com/mod/faithful-mace

---
## Goal

The goal is to make these items naturally obtainable through gameplay without needing the use of commands or even crafting.

---

## Structure Loot Chances — v1.0.1+

**Approximate appearance rates based on in‑game loot table weights:**

### **Wind Charges**
- **~80%** — Ancient City
- **~35%** — Pillager Outpost
- **~25%** — Desert Pyramid
- **~40%** — Jungle Temple
- **~8%** — Trail Ruins (Common)
- **~4%** — Trail Ruins (Rare)
### **Mace**
- **~15%** — Ancient City *(Exclusive)*
### **Enchanted Mace**
- **~5%** — Ancient City *(Exclusive)*

## Structure Loot Chances 1.0.0 OUTDATED⚠️

**Approximate appearance rates:**

- **Wind Charges:**
  - ~80% chance - Ancient City
- **Mace:** ~15% chance
  - Ancient City (Exclusive)
- **Enchanted Mace:** ~5% chance
  - Ancient City (Exclusive)

---
